Event: Summer Festival 2026
Event Date: 01/06/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: T227
Get Out of My Forest Totem

Once in a while, the unit steals 20% health, spell power, physical and magic armor from 3 enemy units with the greatest spell power, and deals magic damage equal to 30% of own spell power to the targets. The unit also restores health equal to 80% of the damage dealt by the ability to self and all allied units.

- Level 20
Once in a white, the unit steals 25% health, spell power, physical and magic armor from 3 enemy units with the greatest spell power, and deals magic damage equal to 35% of own spell power to the targets. The
unit also restores health equal to 85% of the damage dealt by the ability to self and all allied units.

- Level 40
Once in a while, the unit steals 30% health, spell power, physical and magic armor from 3 enemy units with the greatest spell power, and deals magic damage equal to 40% of own spell power to the targets. The unit also restores health equal to 90% of the damage dealt by the ability to self and all allied units.

Requirements: 90
